productDisplayName: Clarks Men Vent Jump Black Sandals
description: Style Note Handcrafted leather goodness for your feet - with love from clarks. This sandal is moulded to Fit your feet to perfection and designed to add an understated polish to your ensemble. Product Details Leather forefoot straps and an ankle loop with a Velcro closure Padded nubuck footbed with a heel patch TPU outsole with oatterned grooves and lugs, curved at the midfoot and upraised at the heel Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for added shine
